summary: Copy-scrubbing regression pass. Verified hero logo shrunk (max-width 640px), nav wordmark grew (40px), every page contains only approved verbatim copy, all invented labels/eyebrows/chapter numbers/asides absent, consent banner + cookie prefs modal show approved Section 4 text, Fit form submit → 200 → success shown, FAQPage JSON-LD (2 entities) matches visible DOM strings. Backend pytest 6/6 passing.
critical_code_review_comments: AnimatedLogo.jsx RAW_SVG is duplicated between the full logo and the Wordmark component (~50 lines of SVG each) — dead animated bars/shine are rendered inside the nav Wordmark even though only the wordmark type is desired. Consider factoring a wordmark-only SVG constant to reduce DOM weight in the nav on every page.
Fit.jsx line 161 uses `void SITE;` to silence lint — smells; either remove the import or reference SITE.ctaLabel legitimately (or add /* eslint-disable */).

HowItWorks.jsx useSeo description still says 'We diagnose before we prescribe' — the request confirmed this is acceptable in meta but should stay out of visible DOM (verified absent). No action needed.
seed_data_creation: One additional TEST_UI_ prefixed Fit submission created via the Fit form during Playwright run. Safe to leave.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fit form input testids target the <input> elements directly (fit-input-name, fit-input-business, fit-input-email, fit-input-prompt). Consent banner appears on first visit only; set localStorage.thrumline_consent_v1 to skip. Hero logo container inline max-width is 640px at desktop; nav Wordmark inline height is 40px.
verified_features: Home: all 8 approved paragraphs present; 11 forbidden strings absent (Est. 2026, Signal/Noise, Vol. 001, Reasons to believe, The bridge, Signal not noise, Senior hands as home card, 01·, 02·, 03·, 04·)
What We Do: 5 offerings, 2 differentiators, close paragraph present; Reasons to believe / Two things separate us / The bridge absent

How It Works: 5 approved paragraphs + close present; 'The posture', 'The method', 'Step one/two', 'The honest promise', 'Note. Discovery is introduced', 'We diagnose before we prescribe.' all absent from visible DOM
Signals: 2 Q&A pairs + intro present; The archive, Field note, If any of this rhymes absent
Signals FAQPage JSON-LD mainEntity length=2 with EXACT-match question.name and acceptedAnswer.text to visible DOM
Fit form submits → 200 → data-testid=fit-success shown ('One conversation. No pressure. Worth finding out.'); no invented Received/Thank you copy
Privacy: sections 4 / 4a / 4b + GA + Clarity paragraphs present; The fine print in plain English, Section 4 eyebrow, Last updated, What we measure absent
404: only 'Not found.' and Back to home; 404 · Off the trail / Nothing here / Ranger absent
Footer: wordmark + nav + Privacy Policy + email mailto + LinkedIn + Cookie preferences + © 2026 Thrumline LLC. Signal not noise / A short conversation is worth finding out / Get in touch absent
Consent banner (localStorage cleared): approved Section 4 title + Yes but only if you say yes paragraph; A quiet ask / May we measure absent; 3 buttons present

Cookie preferences modal: functional 'Cookie preferences' title + approved intro; toggles for Google Analytics + Microsoft Clarity as plain names only; Cancel/Save/Reset buttons; Turn things on or off / Google Analytics 4 with subtitle absent
Backend: /api/fit/submit 200 with persistence; 422 on missing/invalid email; 422 on missing name; /api/health + /api/ root OK
